original_image_tags: Handwritten initials or notation in bottom right corner.

elements.description: A typewritten letter dated July 9, 1953, addressed to Mr. W. S. Woodfill at the Grand Hotel in Mackinac Island, Michigan. The letter acknowledges receipt of a previous communication and includes typed and handwritten administrative annotations.

judge.reason: Description A describes a handwritten visual element (initials/notation in bottom right corner), while Description B describes a typed letter with administrative annotations, indicating the two descriptions are about clearly different visual content on the page.
